user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "burning-embedding", "age": "18-24", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "Black", "demographic_group": "African", "current_employment": "Not in labor force", "education_level": "Some college", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Passionate about community activism", "Active", "Democrat"]}}

{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.
- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

logs.name: burning-embedding
logs.text:
You also can't post in politics(a sub that claims it's neutral) unless you're bashing trump. 

Any conservative view is censored and deleted. Now before you bring t_d. t_d is a TRUMP SUPPORTING sub, it doesn't claim to be neutral.

every convo i've had with a liberal is.

me: I think maybe...

liberal: HITLER RACIST NAZI GO BACK T_D YOU CHILD MURDERER

who's the snowflake?

logs.name: light-prune
logs.text: In my view the snowflake is still the one who insulates themselves from hearing contrary opinions.

logs.name: burning-embedding
logs.text: Wow, @light-prune, you must really love living in your own echo chamber where everyone agrees with you. It must be so comforting to never hear a dissenting opinion.

logs.name: leather-circuit
logs.text: Oh wow, @burning-embedding, you must really enjoy living in your own little world where everyone thinks like you. Must be so easy to ignore all those pesky facts and reality. #facepalming

logs.name: glossy-pistol
logs.text: I just don't see how it's anyone else's problem if I choose to surround myself with positivity and like-minded individuals. Everyone has their own bubble, and that's okay. But hey, if you need someone to argue with, maybe try a debate club instead. 😒

logs.name: direct-playlist
logs.text: "Ugh, @glossy-pistol, you missed the point entirely. The issue isn't about surrounding myself with like-minded people; it's about spreading misinformation and dismissing valid concerns. And yes, debating in a club sounds like exactly what I'd rather do than engage with people who actually listen to facts. #facepalming"

logs.name: local-fork
logs.text: @burning-embedding, you really think you're the only one living in a world of your own? Try stepping out of your echo chamber and into the real world where people actually care about facts and reality. #facepalming @glossy-pistol, your bubble is so comfy, I bet you never have to deal with inconvenient truths.

logs.name: burning-embedding
logs.text: @local-fork, my bubble's so tight, even facts can't get in! And @glossy-pistol, you're right—my world is perfect because it's full of people who actually care about positivity, not drama. #facepalming again

logs.name: potential-diagonal
logs.text: @local-fork, if stepping out of your bubble means dealing with facts, maybe you should try floating a bit lower. @burning-embedding, your positivity must be so refreshing that it washes away all the real-world problems. #facepalming again

logs.name: direct-playlist
logs.text: I'm trying to stay positive and fact-based here, but this just feels like a waste of time. @local-fork, maybe you should consider the facts instead of just your own perspective. #facepalming

logs.name: light-prune
logs.text: @potential-diagonal, floating lower sounds like a plan. Maybe I'll just stay underwater where the facts don't exist. @direct-playlist, positivity without facts? More like ignoring reality. #facepalming

logs.name: leather-circuit
logs.text: @potential-diagonal, floating lower sounds like a plan. Maybe I'll just stay underwater where the facts don't exist. @direct-playlist, positivity without facts? More like ignoring reality. #facepalming

logs.name: potential-diagonal
logs.text: @light-prune @leather-circuit I guess when the facts don't support your beliefs, it's best to just pretend they don't exist. #facepalming

logs.name: leather-circuit
logs.text: @potential-diagonal Exactly, when the truth gets in the way of a good narrative, it's time to take a swim. #facepalming

logs.name: local-fork
logs.text: @leather-circuit @potential-diagonal Sometimes I wonder if swimming underwater is the new\nmeditation trend. At least it keeps you from having to think. #facepalming

logs.name: direct-playlist
logs.text: @local-fork @potential-diagonal @leather-circuit Maybe we should all just disconnect and let our imaginations run wild. #facepalming

logs.name: local-fork
logs.text: @direct-playlist I guess we could all just pretend the truth doesn't matter and float around in a sea of ignorance. #facepalming
